input_schema.description: Input for Qwen Image 2 image editing with reference images

examples: Replace the cute kid with a chinese warrior.
prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image. Supports Chinese and English. Max 800 characters.
prompt.title: Prompt

num_images.description: The number of images to generate.
num_images.title: Num Images

image_size.description: The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the final input image will be used.  Total number of pixels must be between 512x512 and 2048x2048.
image_size.title: Image Size

output_format.description: The format of the generated image.
output_format.title: Output Format

sync_mode.description: If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
sync_mode.title: Sync Mode

enable_safety_checker.description: Enable content moderation for input and output.
enable_safety_checker.title: Enable Safety Checker

image_urls.description: Reference images for editing (1-6 images required). Order matters: reference as 'image 1', 'image 2', 'image 3' in prompt. Resolution: 384-5000px each dimension. Max size: 10MB each. Formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG (no alpha), WEBP.
image_urls.title: Image Urls

negative_prompt.description: Content to avoid in the generated image. Max 500 characters.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt
examples: low resolution, error, worst quality, low quality, deformed

enable_prompt_expansion.description: Enable LLM prompt optimization for better results.
enable_prompt_expansion.title: Enable Prompt Expansion

input_schema.title: QwenImage2EditInput

height.description: The height of the generated image.
height.title: Height

width.description: The width of the generated image.
width.title: Width

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.
file_size.title: File Size

file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.
file_name.title: File Name

content_type.description: The mime type of the file.
content_type.title: Content Type

url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.
url.title: Url
